title: selaginella valida
intro: Selaginella valida is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spike moss or resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella valida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in traditional remedies.
